parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  tenant_id: $json.tenant_id,
  first_name: $json.first_name,
  last_name: $json.last_name,
  email: $json.email,
  phone: $json.phone,
  program_interest: $json.program_interest,
  source: $json.source,
  inquiry_ip_address: $json.inquiry_ip_address,
  inquiry_user_agent: $json.inquiry_user_agent,
  inquiry_submitted_at: $json.inquiry_submitted_at,
  eligibility_status: $json.eligibility_status,
  remarketing_eligible: $json.remarketing_eligible
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { name: 'COIN Education', email: 'admissions@coineducation.com' }, to: [{ email: $json.email, name: $json.first_name }], subject: 'Thank you for your interest in COIN Education!', htmlContent: `

COIN Education™

Dear ${$json.first_name},

Thank you for your interest in ${$json.program_interest} at COIN Education Services Center!

We've received your inquiry and a member of our admissions team will be reaching out to you shortly to schedule a discovery call.

During the discovery call, we'll discuss:

  • Your career goals and how our program aligns with them
  • Program curriculum, schedule, and duration
  • Tuition, payment options, and financial assistance
  • Next steps in the admissions process

In the meantime, feel free to explore our website or reply to this email with any questions.

Visit Our Website

We look forward to speaking with you!

Warm regards,
COIN Education Admissions Team
admissions@coineducation.com

COIN Education Services Center™ | MBE/WBE Certified | Atlanta, GA

This email was sent because you submitted an interest form at coineducation.com

` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: `🎓 New COIN Education Inquiry\n\n` + `Name: ${$json.first_name} ${$json.last_name}\n` + `Email: ${$json.email}\n` + `Phone: ${$json.phone || 'Not provided'}\n` + `Program: ${$json.program_interest}\n` + `Time: ${new Date($json.inquiry_submitted_at).toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: 'America/New_York', dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' })} EST\n\n` + `Action needed: Schedule discovery call` }) }}
